successCriteria.description: src/modules/employee/employee.service.ts exists and exports IEmployeeService and EmployeeService
EmployeeService uses IEmployeeRepository for all data access (GP-001)
All public methods validate input parameters (GP-003)
All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (GP-001)
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (GP-003)
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data (GP-004)
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)
outOfScope: Phase 4-10 (Policy service, Balance model/repository/service, Notification/Audit, LeaveRequest model/repository, Leave orchestration service, routes/controllers)
Any state-changing operations (create, update, delete) on Employee
